action_steps.title: Reorganize by feature slice
action_steps.detail: Current backend/src/main/java/com/demo/sso/ structure organizes by layer (controller/, service/, model/, config/, exception/, repository/). Feature-slice organization would group by domain: auth/ (controllers + services + DTOs for authentication), user/ (UserController + UserService + User model), token/ (verifiers + JWT service), challenge/ (auth code + nonce stores). This is a large refactor affecting all files. Evaluate if the codebase (71 files, 6472 LOC) is large enough to benefit from feature slicing. For a project this size, layer-based organization is typically adequate.

action_steps.title: Split service package
action_steps.detail: Current backend/src/main/java/com/demo/sso/service/ package has subpackages: auth/ (3 files), token/ (4 files), challenge/ (5 files), model/ (3 files), and UserService.java at root. The structural-organization cluster already plans to move UserService to service/user/. After that move, the service/ root will be empty. The subpackage structure (auth, token, challenge, model) already follows domain grouping. Additional splitting is not needed — the existing subpackages are well-organized.
